mnemonics: Many Cats Understand Numbers Better Tonight
keyPoints: Packet Switching explains how data is sent over networks by breaking into small packets and routing them independently.
IPv4 Address is used to identify devices on a network and is typically written in dotted decimal format (e.g., 192.168.1.1).
IPv4 Datagram refers to the data packet sent over a network using the IPv4 protocol, containing the IP header and payload.
